OneDriveWarning:
Kitendakazi "WinPrtScrFolder -Desktop" kitatumika tu ikiwa mtumiaji aliisanidi hati kuondoa OneDrive (au OneDrive ilikuwa tayari imeondolewa).
Vinginevyo utendakazi wa kuhifadhi nakala za folda "Desktop" na "Pictures" katika OneDrive utavunjika.
